data.title: Alibaba Eyes Double-Digit Growth for Singles' Day in Hong Kong, Waives Delivery Fees
data.description: Alibaba's Singles' Day campaign in Hong Kong expects double-digit growth with new free shipping promotion and government stimulus.

data.title: Cannabis Can Be A 'Great Tool In Dealing With Adversity,' Says Former NFL Star Ricky Williams
data.description: Ricky Williams advocates for cannabis in sports and beyond, sharing how it helped him cope with the pressures of football.

data.title: US Cellular Sells Key Spectrum Licenses To Verizon In $1B Deal
data.description: US Cellular sells part of its spectrum licenses to Verizon for $1.0 billion, aligning with their plan to monetize unused spectrum and T-Mobile sale.
